repo_signals: L3 smoke for code.robotics: ROS2 nodes and topics, a real-time PID control loop, sensor fusion with an EKF, tf2 coordinate frame transforms, actuator limits and an emergency-stop path
build a CRUD admin dashboard with a REST backend and write tests

retrieval_query: ros ros2 node topic publisher subscriber real-time control loop pid sensor fusion ekf kalman tf2 coordinate frame transform actuator limit emergency stop deterministic timing jitter

validation_smoke.name: code.robotics L3 validation smoke
signals: control loop meets its deadline with bounded jitter under load
tf transform tree is fully connected with no missing or stale frames
sensor fusion output stays consistent under dropped or delayed measurements
emergency-stop path halts all actuators within the required time
actuator commands are clamped to position/velocity/torque limits

diagnosis_smoke.name: code.robotics diagnosis smoke
signals: control loop period jitters because heavy work runs in the timer callback
transforms combined across mismatched or unsynchronized timestamps
actuator commanded past its limit with no clamping or safety check
blocking I/O or allocation inside a real-time control thread
sensor fusion diverges after a dropped measurement (no timeout handling)
